user_query: I'm a music enthusiast and I'm curious about the greatest of all time Hot 100 songs. Can you provide me with the chart information? I'm also interested in the top country artists. Can you fetch the chart information for them as well? Lastly, I'd like to explore some albums from these charts. Can you provide me with the album information?

TaskList.description: Fetch the list of the greatest of all time Hot 100 songs
Fetch the chart information for the top country artists
Retrieve album information related to the greatest Hot 100 songs and top country artists
